name: Stewed Rhubarb
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh rhubarb, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the chopped rhubarb to a saucepan with about 1/4 cup of water.
2. Simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the sugar and simmer for another 5 minutes or until the sugar is completely dissolved.
This recipe pairs well with ice cream, plain low-fat yogurt, pancakes, custard, or can be enjoyed on its own.
